creator: charnier@xp11.frmug.org
text: In the handbook, code that is defined by Future plans for is incorrectly displayed in the window title, I see `Future plans for CTM' instead of `Future plans for CTM'. Fix: Do not allow this in documents or use something like: How-To-Repeat: Browse using Netscape or grep handbook looking for TITLE. handbook216.html:What is FreeBSD-current <em>NOT</em>? handbook224.html:Why should I use <code>CTM</code>? handbook262.html:What's a <em>kernel option</em>, anyway? [...]
